name: Alice - GENSHIN
description:
So I was making this as I was talking to Alice. Because I was like why not I just make a bot of her. It would be fun, right. No, it was very confusing cause I had to find. Some information on her appearance and nothing would give me a clear appearance thing for her. But I got it in the end.

This will be a create your own scenario. But I do hope you all have fun
creator: Gimme_thy_kittens
